name: Dense 20-Node Systematic Review with Long Labels
input: Create a comprehensive CONSORT flow diagram for a large multi-center randomized controlled trial of pembrolizumab plus chemotherapy vs chemotherapy alone in non-small cell lung cancer. Assessed for eligibility: 4,832 patients from 28 centers across 12 countries. Excluded (n=3,207): Did not meet PD-L1 TPS ≥ 50% criteria (n=1,845), Had prior immunotherapy treatment within 12 months (n=523), ECOG performance status > 2 (n=412), Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic treatment (n=198), Brain metastases not adequately treated per protocol (n=229). Randomized (n=1,625): Allocated to pembrolizumab + chemotherapy arm (n=814): Received allocated intervention (n=798), Did not receive (n=16, reasons: withdrew consent n=9, adverse event before first dose n=5, death n=2). Allocated to chemotherapy alone arm (n=811): Received allocated intervention (n=803), Did not receive (n=8, reasons: withdrew consent n=5, protocol deviation n=3). Follow-up at 24 months: Pembrolizumab arm lost to follow-up (n=47, reasons: relocated n=21, non-compliance n=18, unknown n=8), Chemotherapy arm lost to follow-up (n=52, reasons: relocated n=24, non-compliance n=20, unknown n=8). Analyzed: Pembrolizumab arm ITT analysis (n=814), per-protocol (n=767). Chemotherapy arm ITT analysis (n=811), per-protocol (n=759).
qualityCriteria: All major CONSORT stages present (Enrollment, Allocation, Follow-up, Analysis)
Exclusion criteria listed with individual counts
Both treatment arms shown as parallel branches after randomization
Long drug names not truncated (pembrolizumab fully spelled)
No overlapping text or labels despite high node count
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Professional CONSORT diagram with 15+ nodes, clearly separated arms, all numbers visible, no text overflow, multi-line labels where needed.
